title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter and Sign Into an Agreement in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with Agp Elevator Supply and Installation Services with Main Office Address at # 631 Honorio Lopez Blvd., Northbay Shopping Center, Tondo, Manila for Service and Maintenance of the Elevator Unit Installed in the Municipal Building. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 08/16/21)
